menu.title: TO BOLDLY RESPAWN
menu.subtitle: A Co-Op Space Disaster
menu.slogan: Press ENTER to engage in a Courageous Strategic Retrograde!

waves.wave_2: They're Gaining, Throw the Interns Overboard!

pickups.health: Collected 'Emergency Duct Tape'! Rear hull integrity repaired by 25.
pickups.speed: Collected 'Totally Safe Space Snack'! Weapons cooling systems boosted.

endings.gameover: You have boldly respawned. Command will be deducting this starship from your paycheck.
endings.victory: Congratulations, Captain! The audit dreadnought has retreated. The disaster is now slightly further behind us.
